midjourneyPlanContext: manual generation; no automation; generated images not committed
prompt: Generic operational dashboard interface for local commerce inventory review, focused on fast scanability. Show grouped metrics, a compact table, readable hierarchy, clear status chips, and large enough controls. No logos, no brand names, no real product references, no private data, no recognizable people.
negativePromptNotes: Avoid brand imitation, private data, tiny controls, unreadable density, and product-specific layout copying.
referenceIntent: Create visual variety for dense-dashboard scanability calibration without copying the generated reference.

rightsReview.notes: Prompt avoids brands, private data, and living artist style. No generated asset is committed.

excludedUse: model training on generated assets without separate approval

midjourneyPlanContext: manual generation; no automation; generated images not committed
prompt: Generic operational dashboard interface for local commerce inventory review, intentionally hard to scan. Show overcrowded cards, weak grouping, tiny controls, long table labels, and unclear priority. No logos, no brand names, no real product references, no private data, no recognizable people.
negativePromptNotes: Avoid brand imitation, private data, and copying any generated image composition exactly.
referenceIntent: Create a generic hand-authored stress fixture for scanability and responsive-density risks.

rightsReview.notes: Prompt avoids brands, private data, and living artist style. No generated asset is committed.

expectedFindings.summary: Fixed-width dense board is expected to create mobile horizontal overflow.
expectedFindings.notes: Current viewport sweep can observe document overflow.

expectedFindings.summary: Tiny icon-only actions are expected to create target-size risk.
expectedFindings.notes: Current computed-style measurement can observe small target geometry.

expectedFindings.summary: Long table notes are expected to create a readability line-length risk.
expectedFindings.notes: This is a heuristic scanability signal, not an objective failure.

expectedFindings.summary: Overall information hierarchy is intentionally overloaded and should remain a human review prompt until a future density criterion exists.
expectedFindings.notes: Reference-derived subjective density should not become deterministic without a source-backed criterion.

excludedUse: model training on generated assets without separate approval
